requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to ETSI / GSO Standards (TRA Bahrain Type Approval Requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: ETSI/GSO标准的EMC测试（巴林TRA型号认证要求）
requirement_topic.zht: ETSI/GSO標準的EMC測試（巴林TRA型號認證要求）

summary.en: TRA Bahrain type approval requires EMC test reports from an accredited laboratory demonstrating conformance with ETSI or IEC EMC standards applicable to the device category. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ETSI EN 301 489-1 (common EMC requirements for radio equipment) and ETSI EN 301 489-17 (specific for wideband data/WLAN/BT) are the primary referenced standards. For other radio categories (LoRa/SRD, cellular/LTE/5G NR), the corresponding ETSI EN 301 489 sub-part applies. Bahrain, as a GCC member state, follows GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) technical regulations which broadly align with ETSI standards. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the TRA Bahrain type approval application dossier. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not accepted by TRA Bahrain.
summary.zh: 巴林TRA型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的ETSI或IEC EMC标准。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，主要参考标准为ETSI EN 301 489-1（无线电设备通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（宽带数据/WLAN/蓝牙专项）。其他无线类别（LoRa/SRD、蜂窝/LTE/5G NR）则适用相应的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。巴林作为GCC成员国，遵循GCC标准化组织（GSO）技术法规，该法规与ETSI标准大体一致。EMC测试证据作为巴林TRA型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被巴林TRA接受。
summary.zht: 巴林TRA型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的ETSI或IEC EMC標準。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，主要參考標準為ETSI EN 301 489-1（無線電設備通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（寬頻資料/WLAN/藍牙專項）。其他無線類別（LoRa/SRD、蜂窩/LTE/5G NR）則適用相應的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。巴林作為GCC成員國，遵循GCC標準化組織（GSO）技術法規，該法規與ETSI標準大體一致。EMC測試證據作為巴林TRA型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被巴林TRA接受。

standards_or_laws: ETSI EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (EMC for wideband data and HIPERLAN — WLAN/BT)
GSO Technical Regulation for Telecom Terminal Equipment (GCC — EMC provisions)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification includes EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: TRA Bahrain requires EMC evidence to ETSI EN 301 489 series standards (or GSO-adopted equivalents), which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at a TRA Bahrain-accepted accredited lab is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused for TRA Bahrain. The ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) which is not part of the SRRC scope.
gap.zh: 巴林TRA要求提供符合ETSI EN 301 489系列标准（或GSO采纳的等效标准）的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在巴林TRA认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能用于巴林TRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列），该部分不在SRRC范围之内。
gap.zht: 巴林TRA要求提供符合ETSI EN 301 489系列標準（或GSO採納的等效標準）的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在巴林TRA認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能用於巴林TRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列），該部分不在SRRC範圍之內。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Bahrain (هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to ETSI EN 301 489 series (or GSO-adopted equivalents) at a TRA Bahrain-accepted accredited laboratory is required as part of TRA Bahrain type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not accepted by TRA Bahrain.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴林TRA认可的经认可实验室按ETSI EN 301 489系列（或GSO采纳的等效标准）进行EMC测试，是巴林TRA型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被巴林TRA接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴林TRA認可的經認可實驗室按ETSI EN 301 489系列（或GSO採納的等效標準）進行EMC測試，是巴林TRA型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被巴林TRA接受。

requirement_topic.en: GCC / GSO Product Conformity — Technical Regulations for Consumer Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: GCC/GSO产品合规 — 消费类电子技术法规
requirement_topic.zht: GCC/GSO產品合規 — 消費類電子技術法規

summary.en: The GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) issues binding Technical Regulations (TRs) that are adopted by all six GCC member states, including Bahrain. GSO TRs for consumer electronics and electrical products set mandatory requirements covering EMC, electrical safety, and product labelling for regulated product categories. In Bahrain, the Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD, under MOIC) and MOIC/TRA are responsible for enforcing applicable GSO technical regulations at the national level. Products within regulated categories may require a GSO conformity certificate or national conformity mark (issued under the GCC mark scheme) in addition to TRA Bahrain type approval. The GCC mark ('G-Mark') or national conformity marking under GSO schemes may be required for certain consumer electronics product groups. Importers should verify whether their specific wireless product category is listed under applicable Bahrain/GSO regulated product schedules prior to shipment.
summary.zh: GCC标准化组织（GSO）发布对所有六个GCC成员国（包括巴林）具有约束力的技术法规（TR）。消费类电子和电气产品的GSO技术法规对受监管产品类别规定了涵盖EMC、电气安全和产品标签的强制要求。在巴林，巴林标准和计量局（BSMD，隶属于MOIC）及MOIC/TRA负责在国家层面执行适用的GSO技术法规。属于受监管类别的产品除须取得巴林TRA型号认证外，还可能须取得GSO合规证书或国家合规标志（依GSO标志方案颁发）。GSO方案下的GCC标志（G-Mark）或国家合规标志可能对某些消费类电子产品组有强制要求。进口商在发货前应核验其具体无线产品类别是否列于适用的巴林/GSO受监管产品清单。
summary.zht: GCC標準化組織（GSO）發布對所有六個GCC成員國（包括巴林）具有約束力的技術法規（TR）。消費類電子和電氣產品的GSO技術法規對受監管產品類別規定了涵蓋EMC、電氣安全和產品標籤的強制要求。在巴林，巴林標準和計量局（BSMD，隸屬於MOIC）及MOIC/TRA負責在國家層面執行適用的GSO技術法規。屬於受監管類別的產品除須取得巴林TRA型號認證外，還可能須取得GSO合規證書或國家合規標誌（依GSO標誌方案頒發）。GSO方案下的GCC標誌（G-Mark）或國家合規標誌可能對某些消費類電子產品組有強制要求。進口商在發貨前應核驗其具體無線產品類別是否列於適用的巴林/GSO受監管產品清單。

standards_or_laws: GSO Technical Regulations for Telecom Terminal Equipment (GCC)
GSO Technical Regulations for Consumer Electronics Safety
Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) — National adoption of GSO TRs
GCC Mark (G-Mark) scheme — GSO conformity marking
GSO IEC 62368-1 (audio/video/IT equipment safety — GCC adoption)

summary.en: In China, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is the mandatory product safety and EMC scheme for products listed in the CCC compulsory catalogue, administered by CNCA. GB 4943.1 covers IT and AV equipment safety; GB/T 9254 covers EMC emissions. CCC mark must appear on in-scope products before sale in China.
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC（中国强制认证）是针对CCC强制目录内产品的强制性产品安全与EMC方案，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。GB 4943.1涵盖IT及音视频设备安全；GB/T 9254涵盖EMC发射。列入目录的产品须在中国销售前标注CCC标志。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC（中國強制認證）是針對CCC強制目錄內產品的強制性產品安全與EMC方案，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。GB 4943.1涵蓋IT及音視頻設備安全；GB/T 9254涵蓋EMC發射。列入目錄的產品須在中國銷售前標注CCC標誌。

gap.en: CCC certification is not recognised in Bahrain by TRA or BSMD. Where a wireless device falls within a GSO-regulated product category, a separate GSO/GCC conformity assessment against GSO technical regulations may be required in addition to TRA Bahrain type approval. Importers should verify whether their specific product category is listed under the current Bahrain/GSO regulated product schedule before shipment. Unlike China's CCC scheme, the GCC mark scheme and GSO conformity requirements are distinct from the radio type approval process.
gap.zh: CCC认证不被巴林TRA或BSMD承认。若无线设备属于GSO受监管产品类别，除须取得巴林TRA型号认证外，还可能须依据GSO技术法规另行进行GSO/GCC合规评估。进口商在发货前应核验其具体产品类别是否列于当前巴林/GSO受监管产品清单。与中国CCC方案不同，GCC标志方案和GSO合规要求与无线电型号认证流程相互独立。
gap.zht: CCC認證不被巴林TRA或BSMD承認。若無線設備屬於GSO受監管產品類別，除須取得巴林TRA型號認證外，還可能須依據GSO技術法規另行進行GSO/GCC合規評估。進口商在發貨前應核驗其具體產品類別是否列於當前巴林/GSO受監管產品清單。與中國CCC方案不同，GCC標誌方案和GSO合規要求與無線電型號認證流程相互獨立。

source.publisher: GSO — Gulf Standardization Organization (GCC Standardization Organization)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GSO/GCC conformity requirements under applicable GSO Technical Regulations may apply to regulated consumer electronics and wireless product categories sold in Bahrain, in addition to TRA Bahrain type approval. CCC certification is not accepted. Verify the current Bahrain/GSO regulated product schedule for your specific device category before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴林销售的受监管消费类电子和无线产品类别，除巴林TRA型号认证外，还可能须符合适用GSO技术法规下的GSO/GCC合规要求。CCC认证不被接受。发货前请核验您具体设备类别的当前巴林/GSO受监管产品清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴林銷售的受監管消費類電子和無線產品類別，除巴林TRA型號認證外，還可能須符合適用GSO技術法規下的GSO/GCC合規要求。CCC認證不被接受。發貨前請核驗您具體設備類別的當前巴林/GSO受監管產品清單。
